title: セントライト記念にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is set to run the medium-distance
St. Lite Kinen, which measures 2,200 meters long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some people are skeptical of whether Kitasan
Black can run it, since she's being mentored by
Sakura Bakushin O, a known sprinter. Even so, I
have no doubts about her ability as I send her out
on the track.
